Call ID: EXT-017
Type: external
Date: 2026-04-23
Topic: Churn Risk & Escalation
Participants: Naomi (account manager); Raj (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Naomi): Hi Raj, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Raj): The outages last quarter really shook our confidence.
AM (Naomi): Let me get you a firm commitment on the compliance roadmap.
Customer (Raj): That would help. Our leadership pays close attention to this.
AM (Naomi): I'll escalate the reliability concerns to our VP directly.
Customer (Raj): Let's reconvene in two weeks — the clock is ticking for us.
AM (Naomi): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
